stdMortalityCalculator.jstatMissing: Ba a gano jStat ba - ana maye gurbin tazarar daidai da ƙimar-p da kimantawa.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifHigh: Yawan mutuwa yana da mahimmanci a ƙididdiga.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifLow: Ƙarancin mutuwa yana da mahimmanci a ƙididdiga.

stdMortalityCalculator.helpPrinciple: RMS (SMR) yana kwatanta mutuwar da aka lura a cikin wata takamaiman jama'a da mutuwar da ake tsammani idan wannan jama'a tana da matakan mutuwa iri ɗaya da na jama'a gabaɗaya.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpCi: MK yana nuna amincin sakamako. Idan ya ƙunshi ƙimar 1, sakamakon ba shi da mahimmanci a ƙididdiga.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpExactDesc: Dangane da rarraba Poisson da dokar χ². Makoma ga ƙananan adadi.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpMidPDesc: Gyaran ci-gaba na gwajin daidai, ba shi da ƙarfi sosai.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpByarDesc: Kimantawar Rothman & Boice (1979), tana da inganci sosai ko da O > 5.

introduction.subtitle: Cikakken jagorar sassan ƙididdigar halittu da kwaikwaya.

stdMortalityCalculator.title: Mai ƙididdige RMS
stdMortalityCalculator.subtitle: Cututtuka da ƙididdigar mutuwa.
stdMortalityCalculator.copySuccess: An kwafi sakamako a cikin allo.
stdMortalityCalculator.exportSuccess: An fitar da PDF cikin nasara.
stdMortalityCalculator.footnote: * Ga ƙananan adadi (lura ≤ 5), fifita hanyoyin daidai (Fisher, Mid‑P).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifHigh: Yawan yana da mahimmanci a ƙididdiga (MK gabaɗaya > 1,0).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifLow: Ragewar yana da mahimmanci a ƙididdiga (MK gabaɗaya < 1,0).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationNotSignif: Bambancin ba shi da mahimmanci a ƙididdiga (MK ya ƙunshi 1,0).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpPrinciple: Matsakaicin Rabon Mutuwa (RMS, ko SMR a Turanci) shine rabo tsakanin adadin mutuwar da aka lura a cikin jama'ar da ake nazari da adadin mutuwar da ake tsammani bisa ka'ida idan wannan jama'a tana da matakan mutuwa iri ɗaya da na jama'ar tunani.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpRiskExcess: Yawan mutuwa idan aka kwatanta da tunani.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpProtective: Ƙarancin mutuwa — tasirin kariya mai yuwuwa.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpCi: MK da bai ƙunshi 1,0 ba yana nuna bambanci mai mahimmanci a ƙididdiga a matakin da aka zaɓa.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpExactDesc: MK daidai na Garwood (1936) dangane da dokar χ². Gwajin Poisson daidai mai gefe biyu.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpMidPDesc: Gwajin Mid-P na Lancaster (1961). Ba shi da ƙarfi kamar gwajin daidai. MK ana ƙididdige shi ta hanyar bisection na lambobi.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpByarDesc: Kimantawar cubic ta Byar (Rothman & Boice, 1979). Amintacce ga lura ≥ 1. ƙimar-p ta hanyar juyar da MK.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpVdbDesc: Canjin tushen murabba'i na Vandenbroucke (1982). ƙimar-p : z = 2(√lura − √tsam).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpRgDesc: MK log-al'ada : exp(ln(RMS) ± z/√lura). Rothman & Greenland (1998). Ba a bayyana shi ba ga lura = 0.
stdMortalityCalculator.reportFooter: An ƙirƙira rahoton ta atomatik — don dalilai na cututtuka kawai.

twoByTwoTable.title: Tebura 2×2
twoByTwoTable.description: Kimanta haɗin kai tsakanin bayyanar da cuta.
twoByTwoTable.explanation: Tebura 2×2 suna haɗa bayyanar (e/a) da cuta (e/a). Ƙididdigar da aka samar sun haɗa da gwajin daidai na Fisher da mid-p, khi-carré, odds ratio, hadarin dangi, bambancin hadari da ɓangarorin asali.

proportions.title: Kashi-kashi
proportions.exactClopperPearson: • Daidai (Clopper-Pearson) : Mai tsaro, dangane da rarraba binomial
proportions.wilson: • Wilson : Ana ba da shawarar ga yawancin yanayi
proportions.midPExact: • Mid-P daidai : Ba shi da ƙarfi kamar Clopper-Pearson
proportions.useCaseDescription: Daga cikin mutane 500 da aka gwada, 75 suna da kwayar cutar. Menene ainihin yaduwar?

proportionsSample.title: Girman samfurin ga kashi
proportionsSample.description: Yana ƙididdige girman samfurin da ake buƙata don kimanta kashi.
proportionsSample.explanation: Wannan sashe yana ƙayyade adadin mutanen da ake buƙata don kimanta kashi tare da ingantaccen daidaito.
proportionsSample.exampleDescription: Don kimanta yaduwar 20% tare da daidaito na ±3% da matakin amincewa na 95% :

oneRate.title: Gwajin adadi ɗaya
oneRate.description: Inference akan adadin faruwa ko mutuwa.
oneRate.explanation: Yana kwatanta adadin da aka lura da adadin tunani ko ƙididdige tazarar amincewarsa. Yana amfani da rarraba Poisson ga abubuwan da ba kasafai ba.
oneRate.rateFormula: Adadi = Adadin abubuwan da suka faru / Mutum-lokaci
oneRate.exampleDescription: A cikin ƙungiyar mutane 10,000 da aka biyo bayan shekaru 5, an lura da lokuta 25.

compareTwoRates.title: Kwatanta adadi biyu
compareTwoRates.explanation: Yana kwatanta adadi biyu dangane da bayanan mutum-lokaci. Yana ƙididdige rabon adadi (rate ratio) da bambancin adadi tare da tazarar amincewarsu, da kuma gwajin Mantel-Haenszel.

anova.title: ANOVA mai lamba ɗaya
anova.description: Kwatanta matsakaita na rukuni uku ko fiye.
anova.explanation: ANOVA (Binciken Bambance-bambance) yana gwada hasashe maras tushe cewa matsakaitan rukunoni da yawa daidai suke. Yana rarraba jimillar bambance-bambance zuwa bambance-bambancen tsakanin rukunoni da bambance-bambancen cikin rukunoni.
anova.anovaTable: Teburin ANOVA : Jimlar murabba'ai, digiri na 'yanci, matsakaicin murabba'ai

tTest.title: Gwajin t na Student
tTest.description: Kwatanta matsakaita biyu (samfurori masu zaman kansu).
tTest.explanation: Gwajin t yana kwatanta matsakaita na rukunoni biyu masu zaman kansu. Ana ba da nau'i biyu : gwajin t na Student (bambance-bambance daidai) da gwajin t na Welch (bambance-bambance marasa daidai).
tTest.hartleyFTest: Gwajin F na Hartley don kwatanta bambance-bambance

meanConfidenceInterval.title: Tazarar amincewa na matsakaita
meanConfidenceInterval.explanation: Yana ƙididdige tazarar amincewa ga matsakaita daga ƙididdigar siffantawa na samfurin (n, matsakaita, karkatacciyar hanya). Yana amfani da rarraba t na Student.

meanDifferencePower.title: Ƙarfi don bambancin matsakaita
meanDifferencePower.description: Yana ƙididdige ƙarfin gwajin kwatanta matsakaita.
meanDifferencePower.explanation: Ƙarfi shine yuwuwar ƙin yarda da hasashe maras tushe lokacin da yake kuskure. Wannan sashe yana ƙididdige shi daga girman samfurori, bambancin da ake tsammani da sauye-sauye.

meanDifferenceSample.title: Girman samfurin don bambancin matsakaita
meanDifferenceSample.description: Yana ƙayyade adadin mutanen da ake buƙata.
meanDifferenceSample.explanation: Yana ƙididdige girman samfurin da ake buƙata don gano wani bambanci da aka bayar tsakanin matsakaita biyu, tare da ƙayyadadden ƙarfi da matakin amincewa.
meanDifferenceSample.minimumDifference: • Bambanci mafi ƙaranci da za a gano (Δ)
meanDifferenceSample.standardDeviation: • Karkatacciyar hanya (σ) — gama gari ko daban

medianPercentileCi.title: Tazarar amincewa na matsakaici da kashi dari
medianPercentileCi.description: Kimanta maras ma'auni don rarrabawa marasa al'ada.
medianPercentileCi.explanation: Yana ƙididdige tazarar amincewa ga matsakaici da kashi dari (25th, 75th, da sauransu) ta amfani da hanyar binomial ko dangane da matsayi.

unmatchedCaseControl.title: Binciken shari'a-masu kula da ba a haɗa ba
unmatchedCaseControl.description: Binciken haɗin bayyanar-cuta a cikin nazarin shari'a-masu kula.
unmatchedCaseControl.explanation: Wannan sashe yana bincika bayanan nazarin shari'a-masu kula da ba a haɗa ba. Yana ƙididdige odds ratio (OR), tazarar amincewarsa 95% kuma yana yin gwajin χ² na Mantel-Haenszel don gwada haɗin.

sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.title: Girman samfurin (shari'a-masu kula da ba a haɗa ba)
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.description: Yana ƙididdige adadin shari'o'i da masu kula da ake buƙata.
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.explanation: Wannan sashe yana ƙididdige girman samfurin don nazarin shari'a-masu kula da ba a haɗa ba. Masu amfani suna shigar da matakin amincewa da ake so, ƙarfi, adadin bayyanar a tsakanin masu kula, da ko dai odds ratio ko adadin bayyanar a tsakanin shari'o'i.
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.fleiss: Fleiss — tare/ba tare da gyaran ci-gaba ba
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.exposureProportionControls: Adadin bayyanar a tsakanin masu kula : 59.3%

matchedCaseControl.title: Binciken shari'a-masu kula da aka haɗa
matchedCaseControl.description: Binciken bayanan da aka haɗa (1:1, 1:n, M:N).
matchedCaseControl.explanation: Don nazarin shari'a-masu kula da aka haɗa, wannan sashe yana ƙididdige odds ratio na Mantel-Haenszel, tazarar amincewa da gwajin McNemar. Yana sarrafa haɗin 1:1, 1:n da M:N.

cohort.title: Binciken nazarin ƙungiya
cohort.description: Ƙididdigar hadarin dangi, bambancin hadari da ɓangarorin da ake dangantawa.
cohort.explanation: A cikin nazarin ƙungiya, ana bin ƙungiyoyin da suka bayyana da waɗanda ba su bayyana ba cikin lokaci. Wannan sashe yana ƙididdige hadarin dangi (RR), bambancin hadari (RD), da ɓangarorin asali a cikin masu bayyana da a cikin jama'a.

rct.title: Gwajin da aka sarrafa bazuwar (RCT)
rct.description: Bincike na musamman ga gwaje-gwajen asibiti bazuwar.
rct.explanation: Sashe da aka keɓe don gwaje-gwajen bazuwar. Yana ƙididdige hadarin dangi, rage hadarin cikakken (RAR), adadin da ake buƙata don magani (NNT), da tazarar amincewa masu dacewa.
rct.treatmentGroup: Rukunin magani : 15 abubuwan da suka faru / 200
rct.controlGroup: Rukunin kulawa : 30 abubuwan da suka faru / 200

screening.title: Ƙimar gwajin bincike
screening.description: Hankali, ƙayyadaddun kaddara, ƙimar tsinkaya, rahotannin yuwuwa.
screening.explanation: Wannan sashe yana ƙima aikin gwajin bincike idan aka kwatanta da ma'aunin zinariya. Yana ƙididdige hankali, ƙayyadaddun kaddara, ƙimar tsinkaya mai kyau da mara kyau, rahotannin yuwuwa, ma'aunin Youden, da ma'aunin Kappa na Cohen.

doseResponse.title: Matsakaici-amsa (χ² na yanayi)
doseResponse.description: Gwajin yanayin layi don fiye da matakan bayyanar biyu.
doseResponse.explanation: Wannan sashe yana yin gwajin χ² na yanayin layi na Mantel-Haenszel don bayanai masu fiye da matakan bayyanar biyu (misali, matakan da aka ƙara). Yana ƙididdige ƙimar-p a digiri 1 na 'yanci don gwada hasashe na alakar layi tsakanin bayyanar da hadari.
doseResponse.multipleStrata: Za a iya shigar da matakai da yawa don sarrafa abubuwan rikicewa.

rByCTable.title: Tebur R x C
rByCTable.description: Binciken teburan daidaituwa na kowane girman.
rByCTable.explanation: Wannan sashe yana faɗaɗa binciken teburan 2×2 zuwa teburan girma R (layuka) × C (ginshiƙai). Yana ƙididdige χ² na Pearson, rabon yuwuwa (G²), ma'aunin daidaituwa, da V na Cramer. Hakanan yana iya bincika matakai da yawa.
rByCTable.associationBloodGroupDisease: Haɗin tsakanin rukunin jini da cuta (rukuni 3 × nau'ikan 4)

randomNumbers.title: Mai samar da lambobi bazuwar
randomNumbers.description: Samar da lambobi bazuwar don bazuwar da kwaikwaya.
randomNumbers.explanation: Wannan sashe yana samar da lambobi bazuwar bisa ga rarrabawa daban-daban : uniform, al'ada, binomial, Poisson. Hakanan yana iya samar da jeri don bazuwar gwaje-gwajen asibiti (tubalan da aka sauya).

simulation.description: Kwaikwayi yaduwar cuta mai yaɗuwa tsakanin yankuna masu alaƙa, tare da ƙirar sassa da shisshigi.
simulation.explanation1: Wannan sashe yana ba da damar kwaikwayar yadda annoba ke faruwa akan hanyar sadarwar yankuna (misali ƙasashe, gundumomi). Kowane yanki yana da nasa yawan jama'a da nasa sassa (S, E, I, R, D, Q bisa ga ƙirar da aka zaɓa). Yankuna suna da alaƙa ta hanyoyin da ke ƙirƙirar kwararar jama'a (motsi), wanda ke tasiri ga motsi tsakanin yankuna.
simulation.explanation2: Ƙididdigar tana amfani da daidaitattun bambance-bambance na yau da kullun (ODE) a cikin lokaci mai hankali. Mai amfani zai iya daidaita siffofin cututtuka, ƙara shisshigi (tsarewa, rigakafi) da lura da tasirin a ainihin lokaci akan taswira mai ma'amala, zane-zane, ko hanyar sadarwa mai ƙarfi.
simulation.sir: SIR : S, I, R - Ƙirar tushe ba tare da lokacin ɓoyewa ba
simulation.seir: SEIR : S, E, I, R - Ƙara lokacin bayyanar (E)
simulation.seird: SEIRD : S, E, I, R, D - Ya haɗa da mace-mace (D)
simulation.seiqrd: SEIQRD : S, E, I, Q, R, D - Ƙara keɓewa (Q)
simulation.interactiveMap: Taswira mai ma'amala : 2D (Leaflet) ko 3D (Globe) tare da alamomi masu daidaita da yawan jama'a da kwararar motsi.
simulation.evolutionCurves: Masu lanƙwasa na canji : Bin diddigin sassa S, E, I, R, D cikin lokaci. Yiwuwar kwatanta kwaikwaya biyu.
simulation.dynamicGraph: Zane mai ƙarfi : Zane-zane tare da rundunonin jagora, tare da kulli masu launi bisa ga adadin kamuwa, haɗin kai da aka auna ta motsi.
simulation.detailedData: Bayanai dalla-dalla : Cikakken jerin yankuna tare da adadinsu ta kowane sashi da adadin kamuwa.
simulation.preDefinedScenarios: Yanayin da aka riga aka yi rikodi
simulation.strictLockdown: Tsarewa mai tsauri : rage motsi zuwa 5%
simulation.massVaccination: Rigakafi mai yawa : β ya ragu, inganci 40% a Rana 30
simulation.lateIntervention: Shisshigi a makare : tsarewa a Rana 50, R₀=3.0
simulation.cumulativeInterventions: Shisshigi da yawa na iya taruwa (tasirin ninki).
simulation.advancedSettingsByView: Saituna na gaba ta kowane gani
simulation.map: Taswira : Nau'in : 2D (Leaflet) / 3D (Globe) | Jigo : haske, duhu, tauraron dan adam | Siffar alamomi : da'ira / gunki | Fayyace layukan (motsi)
simulation.graphs: Zane-zane : Salon layi : ci-gaba / dige-dige | Kauri mai daidaitawa | Fayyace cikawa a ƙarƙashin masu lanƙwasa | Grid mai nunawa/ɓoyewa | Rubutu don shisshigi
simulation.network: Hanyar sadarwa : Siffar kulli : da'ira, murabba'i, triangle | Salon haɗin kai : ci-gaba / dige-dige | Ƙarfin turewa (caji) | Gungurawa ta yanki (dangane da siffar gungu)
simulation.step1: Zaɓi ƙira (SEIRD ta asali) da yanayi (Tushe).
simulation.step2: Danna Fara don ƙaddamar da kwaikwaya. Ka lura da canjin akan taswira da zane-zane.
simulation.step3: Ƙara shisshigi (tsarewa) ta hanyar maɓallin da aka keɓe don ganin tasirinsa akan masu lanƙwasa na masu kamuwa.
simulation.step4: Canza zuwa yanayin kwatanta don kwaikwayi yanayi dabam tare da siffofi daban-daban kuma kwatanta masu lanƙwasa.
simulation.keyboardShortcuts: Gajerun hanyoyin madannai (yanayin taswira 3D) : kiban don juya duniya, R don sake tsakiya, 2/3 don canza tsinkaya.
simulation.technicalNote: Bayanan fasaha : Kwaikwayar tana amfani da matakin lokaci mai hankali na rana 1. Daidaitattun suna dogara ne akan ƙirar sassa na yau da kullun. Motsi tsakanin yankuna ana ƙirƙira shi ta hanyar yaduwar da ta dace da bambancin yaduwa.

geospatial.description: Dangane da Leaflet da react-leaflet - bincika bayanan cututtukanka akan taswirori masu ƙarfi.
geospatial.explanation1: Sashen geospatial yana ba da damar ɗorawa, gani da bincika bayanan da ke da alaƙa da wuri (maki, abubuwan da suka faru, adadin faruwa…). Yana ba da hanyoyin wakilci guda uku masu dacewa : alamomi na kowane mutum, gungurawa don manyan adadi, da heatmap (taswirar zafi) don ganin yawa.
geospatial.explanation2: Ana iya shigo da bayanai daga fayilolin CSV ko Excel, ko ta hanyar misalan da aka haɗa (annobobi na tarihi, bayanan nahiyoyi). Binciken AI da aka haɗa yana ba da taƙaitawa ta atomatik, yanayi, da faɗakarwa.
geospatial.dataImport: Shigo da bayanai : Jefa ko zaɓi fayilolinka. Gano ginshiƙan latitude/longitude da ƙimar ƙarfi ta atomatik.
geospatial.multiLayers: Maɗaukaki masu yawa : Kowane bayanai shine maɗaukaki mai zaman kansa. Nuna/ɓoye, canza launi, radius ko fayyace kowane jeri.
geospatial.integratedAIAnalysis: Binciken AI da aka haɗa : Samar da taƙaitawa ta atomatik, yanayi, shawarwari da faɗakarwar hadari daga bayanan da ake iya gani.
geospatial.individualPoints: Maki na kowane mutum : Kowane bayanai ana wakilta shi da da'ira wanda girman da launi suka bambanta bisa ga ƙarfi (misali adadin shari'a). Mafi kyau ga ƙananan bayanai.
geospatial.pointsParameters: Siffofi : radius na duniya, fayyace, launi ta kowane bayanai
geospatial.clustering: Gungurawa : Yana tattara maki masu kusa ta atomatik zuwa gungu wanda girman ke nuna adadin abubuwa. Ana ba da shawarar ga fiye da maki 500.
geospatial.clusteringOptions: Zaɓuɓɓuka : launin gungu, launin rubutu, matsakaicin radius na gungu, kofa na kashewa a zuƙowa
geospatial.heatmap: Heatmap (taswirar zafi) : Yana ganin yawan maki da aka auna da ƙarfi. Mafi kyau don gano gungu ko wuraren hadari.
geospatial.heatmapSettings: Saituna : radius, blur, canjin launi, mafi ƙarancin fayyace
geospatial.heatmapConfig: Heatmap : Radius - girman wurin zafi (asali 25) | Blur - sassaukar canjin (asali 15) | Mafi ƙarancin fayyace - fayyace wuraren sanyi | Canjin launi da za a keɓance - misali: 0.4 → shuɗi, 1.0 → ja
geospatial.clusteringConfig: Gungurawa : Launin gungu da launin rubutu | Matsakaicin radius na gungu (nisa na tattarawa) | Kofa na kashewa - daga wane zuƙowa ake nuna gungu a matsayin maki na kowane mutum | Spiderfy - tsari na gizo-gizo a matsakaicin zuƙowa
geospatial.note: Bayanan fasaha : Kowane bayanai yana riƙe da nasa saitunan gani, gungurawa, heatmap, launi, radius da fayyace. Saitunan duniya suna aiki azaman asali.
geospatial.summary: Taƙaitawa : Bayanin gungu, alaƙa, yanayin duniya
geospatial.insights: Fahimta : Abubuwan da suka shahara : yankin hadari, ƙaruwa, ƙarancin rahoto
geospatial.alerts: Faɗakarwa : Matsayin hadari (ƙasa / matsakaici / babba) da wuraren kulawa
geospatial.step1: Ɗora fayil CSV mai ɗauke da ginshiƙan latitude, longitude da shari'a.
geospatial.step2: Kunna gungurawa don ganin rarraba duniya, sannan canza zuwa heatmap don gano wuraren zafi.
geospatial.step3: A cikin teburin tsarawa, daidaita launin bayanai, radius na maki da fayyace.
geospatial.step4: Danna Bincika don samun rahoton AI tare da matakin hadari da shawarwari.

workspace.description: Gudanar da lambar R kai tsaye a cikin mashigar bincikenka.
workspace.explanation1: Wurin aiki yana ɗauke da injin R cikakke dangane da WebR (fassarar R zuwa WebAssembly). Kuna iya ƙirƙira, buɗe da adana rubutun .R da yawa, gudanar da duk lambar ko layi ɗaya kawai, da ganin sakamako nan take a cikin console ko a matsayin zane-zane.
workspace.explanation2: Ayyuka masu zuwa suna samuwa : gudanar da rubutun, sarrafa fayiloli, console mai ma'amala, ɗaukar zane-zane, sauke hotuna, shigar da fakiti na yau da kullun (ggplot2, dplyr, …). Wasu sassa (animation na gaba, cikakken tallafi na duk fakiti) har yanzu ana inganta su kuma ana nuna su azaman beta.
workspace.interactiveConsole: Console mai ma'amala tare da tarihi
workspace.packageInstallation: Shigar da fakiti ta hanyar webr::install()
workspace.multiFileEditor: Mai gyara fayiloli da yawa : Shafuka don sarrafa rubutu da yawa a lokaci guda. Sake suna, kwafi, share ta hanyar menu na mahallin. Adana ta atomatik a cikin mashigar bincike (localStorage).
workspace.interactiveConsoleFeature: Console mai ma'amala : Shigar da umarnin R kai tsaye, kewaya cikin tarihi da kiban, ganin abubuwan fitarwa na rubutu da zane-zane a cikin wuri ɗaya.
workspace.graphicalVisualizations: Zane-zane na hoto : Duk zane-zanen da R ya samar ana ɗaukar su ta atomatik kuma ana nuna su. Yanayin grid, yanayin animation, sauke kowane ɗaya da faɗaɗa cikakken allo.
workspace.packageManagement: Sarrafa fakiti : Shigar da fakiti daga ma'ajiyar webR (misali: ggplot2, dplyr, KernSmooth) ta hanyar filin da aka keɓe a cikin taken ko kai tsaye da webr::install().
workspace.animationBetaDetail: Animation (beta) : Idan rubutunka ya samar da zane-zane da yawa (misali a cikin madauki), zaka iya ganin su a yanayin grid ko fara animation. Maɓallin yana ba da damar kunna/dakatar da animation. Kewaya da hannu shima yana yiwuwa.
workspace.animationNote: animation yana aiki don jerin da aka riga aka samar, amma karanta ci-gaba na zane-zane masu ƙarfi har yanzu ana inganta shi.
workspace.packageInstallationDetail: Shigar da fakiti : WebR yana ba da damar shigar da fakiti da aka riga aka haɗa don WebAssembly. A cikin taken, akwai filin da aka keɓe da ke ba ka damar shigar da fakiti cikin sauri (misali: ggplot2). Rubutun shigarwa yana nunawa a cikin console.
workspace.packageNote: Fakitin da ke buƙatar dogaro da tsarin ko haɗuwa na asali na iya zama ba su samuwa ba.
workspace.codeExample:
# Kurar annoba mai motsi
x <- seq(-5, 10, length.out = 200)
for (i in 1:40) {
  mu <- i / 8
  y <- dnorm(x, mean = mu, sd = 1.5)
  plot(x, y, type="n", ylim=c(0, 0.3), axes=FALSE)
  polygon(c(x, rev(x)), c(y, rep(0, 200)), col="#3b82f622", border=NA)
  lines(x, y, col="#3b82f6", lwd=3)
  Sys.sleep(0.04)
}
workspace.step3: Danna maɓallin Ƙaddamarwa don gudanar da duk rubutun. Za ka ga animation tana bayyana a cikin console.
workspace.step4: Yi amfani da kiban kewayawa ko maɓallin don sarrafa animation. Fitar da hoto ta danna gunki.

explorer.description: Samun dama kai tsaye zuwa fiye da nassoshi 35 miliyan na nazarin halittu daga wurin aikinka.
explorer.explanation1: Mai bincike yana haɗa cikakkiyar mu'amala zuwa ma'ajiyar bayanai ta PubMed (NCBI). Kuna iya yin bincike ta kalmomi masu mahimmanci, tace ta shekara da nau'in wallafe-wallafe, jera ta dacewa ko kwanan wata, da duba taƙaitaccen bayani dalla-dalla.
explorer.explanation2: Aiki na musamman na samar da tambayoyin MeSH yana amfani da fassarar atomatik na PubMed don ƙarfafa kalmomin bincikenka tare da masu siffanta MeSH masu dacewa. Ana iya adana labaran a cikin gida (favorites) kuma a fitar da su zuwa tsarin RIS don software na sarrafa littattafai.
explorer.advancedSearch: Bincike na gaba : Kalmomi masu mahimmanci, matattara ta lokaci (misali: 2010‑2025), nau'ikan labarai (bitoci, gwajin asibiti, meta-bincike…), jeri ta dacewa ko kwanan wata.
explorer.meshGenerator: Mai samar da MeSH : Daga furci kyauta, dawo da fassarar MeSH da PubMed ta bayar, gami da kalmomin da aka sarrafa da alamun filin (misali: "[PTYP]").
explorer.favoritesExport: Favorites & fitarwa : Adana a cikin gida har zuwa labarai 200. Fitar da shafin sakamako ko duk favorites zuwa tsarin RIS (mai dacewa EndNote, Zotero, Mendeley).
explorer.home: Shafi : Ma'aunin bincike tare da matattara | Samun dama kai tsaye zuwa favorites daga mahadar a ƙasa | Nuna shawarwarin MeSH a cikin teburin daban
explorer.results: Sakamako : Sauyawa cikin sauri tsakanin bincike da favorites | Teburin gefe na cikakken bayanin labari (taƙaitawa, marubuta, DOI, PMID) | Zane-zanen rarraba lokaci na sakamako
explorer.step1: A cikin yanayin da aka tsaki, buga covid-19 vaccine.
explorer.step2: Danna Samar da MeSH don samun tambaya mafi inganci (misali: "COVID-19 Vaccines"[Mesh]). Aiwatar da ita.
explorer.step4: Bincika sakamako, danna labari don ganin cikakken bayani. Ƙara shi zuwa favorites (gunki na alama).
explorer.step5: Canza zuwa shafin Favorites, sannan Fitar da duka don samar da fayil RIS.

explanation_modal.title: Jagora
explanation_modal.slider_body: Zame madaidaicin R0-R365 don ganin yanayin cuta a kowace rana. Taswira da allon kulawa suna sabuntawa nan take. Yi amfani da Kunna don motsa ci gaba.
explanation_modal.models_body: SIR, SEIR, SEIRD, SEIQRD. Ana haɗa cikakken hanya a canjin siffofi — babu kyalkyali yayin kunnawa.
explanation_modal.rt_body: Rt (adadin haifuwa mai aiki) ana ƙididdige shi azaman R0 × S/N × (1 − raguwa). Rt < 1 yana nufin annoba tana ƙarƙashin iko.
explanation_modal.phase_body: Zanen S-I yana zana hanya a sararin S × I. Siffar baka mai siffa ita ce alamar ƙirar cuta da aka tsara da kyau.
explanation_modal.interventions_body: Kowane shisshigi yana rage β da kashi, ana aiwatar da shi daga ranar farawa. Tasirin yana taruwa (an iyakance zuwa 95%).
explanation_modal.comparison_body: Maɓallin "Kwatanta" yana ƙaddamar da kwaikwaya ta layi daya tare da siffofi daban-daban. Masu lanƙwasa suna nunawa a saman juna.

privacy.title: Manufar Sirri
privacy.subtitle: Wepisia
privacy.summary: Wepisia kayan aiki ne mai buɗe tushe na cututtuka da ƙididdigar halittu. Wannan manufar tana bayyana yadda muke sarrafa bayananku.
privacy.noDataDesc: Wepisia baya tattarawa, adanawa ko watsa kowane bayanan sirri. Duk ƙididdigar ana yin su ne a cikin mashigar bincikenku.
privacy.localDesc: Bayanan da aka shigar (ƙimar tebura, siffofin kwaikwaya) suna kasancewa a kan na'urarka kuma ana share su a rufe shafin.
privacy.noTrackingDesc: Babu kuki na ɓangare na uku, babu rubutun bincike, babu talla. Ana mutunta sirrinka gabaɗaya.
privacy.dataCollectedDesc: Babu wani bayanan sirri da ake tattarawa.
privacy.noTrackingData: Bayanan kewayawa ko kuki na bin diddigin
privacy.noHealthData: Bayanan lafiya da za a iya gane su
privacy.localStorageDesc: Ana adana wasu zaɓuɓɓuka a cikin gida :
privacy.clearLocalStorage: Kuna iya share waɗannan bayanan kowane lokaci ta saitunan mashigar bincikenku.
privacy.dataUsageDesc: Bayanan da kuka shigar kawai ake amfani da su don ƙididdiga.
privacy.calculationsDesc: Ƙimar da kuka shigar (misali adadi, siffofi) ana amfani da su ne kawai don samar da sakamakon da aka nuna. Ba a taɓa tura su zuwa sabobin mu ba.
privacy.persistenceDesc: Babu wani bayanai da ake adanawa bayan rufe shafin. Hakanan zaka iya share zaɓuɓɓukan da aka adana da hannu.
privacy.cookiesDesc: Manhajar ba ta amfani da kuki.
privacy.cookiesDetail: Adana cikin gida (localStorage) kawai za a iya amfani dashi don tunawa da zaɓuɓɓukan harshe da yanayin mu'amala. Waɗannan bayanai ba kuki bane kuma ba a taɓa raba su ba.
privacy.thirdPartiesDesc: Babu wani bayani da ake rabawa da ɓangare na uku.
privacy.thirdPartiesDetail: Manhajar ba ta ƙunshi rubutun waje ba (nazari, talla) kuma ba ta watsa wani bayanai. Bukatun hanyar sadarwa kawai sun shafi ɗora albarkatun da ake buƙata don aiki (dakunan karatu na JavaScript, takaddun salo).
privacy.localComputationDesc: Duk ƙididdigar suna faruwa a kan na'urarka. Babu wani bayanai da ke barin mashigar bincikenku.
privacy.httpsDesc: Ana ba da shafin ta HTTPS, yana tabbatar da amincin fayilolin da aka sauke.
privacy.changesDesc: Za a buga kowane canji akan wannan shafin.
privacy.changesDetail: Ana iya sabunta wannan manufar lokaci zuwa lokaci. Kwanan watan sabuntawa ta ƙarshe tana saman shafin. Muna gayyatar ku don duba ta akai-akai.
privacy.contactDesc: Ga kowace tambaya game da wannan manufar.
privacy.openSource: Lambar tushe tana samuwa akan GitHub

about.title: Game da
about.subtitle: Wepisia
about.intro: Kayan aiki mai 'yanci don cututtuka, wanda aka tsara don samun dama a ƙasashe masu ƙarancin albarkatu
about.visionDesc: A ƙasashe masu tasowa, albarkatu galibi suna da iyaka. An tsara Wepisia don biyan waɗannan abubuwan da suka faru : aiki cikin gida, babu shigarwa, yare da yawa, da lambar kyauta (MIT).
about.openEpiDesc: OpenEpi ya kawo sauyi ga samun damar ƙididdigar cututtuka ta hanyar sanya su kyauta, akan layi da kuma samuwa ga kowa. An buga shi ƙarƙashin lasisin MIT, har yanzu shine makoma a duniya.
about.commitmentDesc: Wepisia zai kasance kuma zai ci gaba da zama kyauta, buɗe tushe (MIT) kuma mai yare da yawa. Xcept-Health ne ya haɓaka shi, yana nuna imaninmu : kayan aikin lafiyar jama'a dole ne su kasance masu samuwa ba tare da shinge ba.
about.openEpiHeritageDesc: Mahallin, manufofi da siffofi na ainihin aikin.
about.openEpiContext: OpenEpi ya samo asali ne daga fahimtar cewa software na kasuwanci ba su biya bukatun masana cututtuka koyaushe ba. Ƙungiyar ta so ta samar da shirye-shirye na zamani, waɗanda aka rubuta kuma aka gwada, suna amfani da mu'amala guda ɗaya, suna aiki ta hanyar yanar gizo ko cikin gida, masu zaman kansu daga dandamali, kuma a buɗe tushe.
about.openEpiGoals: Manufofi : samar da shirye-shirye na zamani, masu zaman kansu daga dandamali, a buɗe tushe, sauƙaƙe hulɗa tsakanin masana cututtuka da masu haɓakawa.
about.feature1: Tebura masu ma'auni, gwaje-gwajen bincike, ƙimar hanyoyin bincike
about.feature2: Ƙididdigar ƙarfi don nazarin ƙungiya, shari'a-masu kula, gwaje-gwajen asibiti
about.feature3: Mai samar da lambobi bazuwar, gwajin χ² na yanayi (matsakaici-amsa)
about.feature4: Adana fayilolin sakamako da ɗora bayanan misali
about.genesisDesc: Juyin halitta na Afirka na OpenEpi
about.genesisText: Wanda F. Ariel Shadrac OUEDRAOGO, ɗalibin likitanci kuma mai haɓakawa mai koyar da kansa ɗan Burkina Faso ya ƙaddamar, Wepisia juyin halitta ne na Afirka na OpenEpi. An sake tsara shi gaba ɗaya tare da fasahar zamani (React, Vite, Tailwind), yana kawo :
about.featureModern: Mu'amala ta zamani, mai santsi kuma 100% mai daidaitawa
about.featureSimulation: Kwaikwayar yankuna da yawa na gaba (SIR, SEIR, SEIRD, SEIQRD)
about.featureGeospatial: Zane-zanen wuri mai ma'amala (maki, gungurawa, heatmap)
about.featureEditor: Mai gyara lambar da aka haɗa (R tare da WebAssembly)
about.featureExplorer: Mai bincike PubMed tare da shawarwarin MeSH
about.featureMultilingual: Cikakken yare da yawa (mooré, wolof, haoussa, swahili, faransanci, turanci)
about.recognitionDesc: Muna so mu nuna godiyarmu mai zurfi ga waɗanda suka ƙirƙira OpenEpi
about.otherContributors: da duk sauran masu ba da gudummawa na aikin
about.recognitionConclusion: Ba tare da aikinsu na farko ba, Wepisia ba zai taɓa faruwa ba. Lambar tushensu, da ke samuwa ƙarƙashin lasisin MIT, ta kasance tushen kimiyya wanda aikinku ya dogara akansa.
about.contributeDesc: Masu haɓakawa, masana cututtuka, masu fassara, masu zane : duk gudummawa ana maraba da su!

terms.title: Sharuddan Amfani
terms.subtitle: Wepisia
terms.summary: Da fatan za a karanta waɗannan sharuɗɗan a hankali kafin amfani da Wepisia. Ta hanyar shiga ko amfani da manhajar, kuna yarda da waɗannan sharuɗɗan.
terms.freeAndOpenDesc: Ana ba da Wepisia kyauta ƙarƙashin lasisin MIT. Kuna da 'yancin amfani, gyara da rarraba lambar.
terms.openSourceDesc: Cikakken lambar tushe tana samuwa akan GitHub, yana tabbatar da cikakken fayyace da yuwuwar gudummawar al'umma.
terms.noWarrantyDesc: Ana ba da software "kamar yadda take", ba tare da wani garanti ba. Amfani da kanku.
terms.acceptanceDesc: Ta amfani da Wepisia, kuna karɓar waɗannan sharuɗɗan.
terms.acceptanceDetail: Waɗannan sharuɗɗan amfani suna tafiyar da amfaninku na manhajar Wepisia, gami da duk abun ciki, ayyuka da sabis. Idan ba ku karɓi kowane ɗayan waɗannan sharuɗɗan ba, kada ku yi amfani da manhajar.
terms.useDesc: An yi nufin Wepisia don dalilai na ilimi, bincike da ƙwararru a cututtuka da ƙididdigar halittu.
terms.permittedTeaching: Horar da lafiyar jama'a da ƙarfafa iya aiki
terms.ipDesc: Wepisia software ce mai buɗe tushe.
terms.ipDetail: Lambar tushe tana ƙarƙashin lasisin MIT. Kuna da 'yancin amfani, kwafi, gyara, haɗa, buga, rarraba, ba da lasisi ƙasa da/ko siyar da kwafin software, bisa sharuɗɗan lasisin MIT. Sunayen "Wepisia", "Xcept-Health" da alamomin da ke da alaƙa alamun kasuwanci ne na Xcept-Health.
terms.licenseNotice: Lasisin MIT - duba fayil LICENSE a cikin ma'ajiya don ƙarin bayani.
terms.disclaimerDesc: Ana ba da software "kamar yadda take".
terms.disclaimerDetail: Ana ba da Wepisia ba tare da wani garanti ba, bayyane ko fakaice, gami da, amma ba'a iyakance ga, garantin ingancin kasuwa, dacewa da takamaiman amfani ko rashin cin zarafi. Cikakken hadarin game da inganci da aikin software yana kan ku.
terms.disclaimerMedical: Gargaɗin likita : Wepisia kayan aikin bincike na ƙididdiga da kwaikwaya ne. Ba ya ba da shawarar likita. Duk sakamako dole ne a fassara su ta ƙwararrun ƙwararru. Ba za a iya ɗaukar masu ƙirƙira alhakin shawarwarin asibiti da aka yanke bisa sakamakon ba.
terms.liabilityDetail: A kowane hali, Xcept-Health ko masu ba da gudummawarta ba za a iya ɗaukar alhakin kowane da'awar, lalacewa ko wani alhaki da ya taso daga amfani da Wepisia, ko a cikin kwangila, laifi ko waninsa.
terms.changesDesc: Za mu iya sabunta waɗannan sharuɗɗan lokaci zuwa lokaci.
terms.changesDetail: Muna riƙe haƙƙin gyara waɗannan sharuɗɗan amfani kowane lokaci. Za a buga gyare-gyare akan wannan shafin tare da sabunta ranar aiki. Ci gaba da amfani da manhajar bayan kowane gyara ya zama karɓar sababbin sharuɗɗan.
terms.contactDesc: Kuna da tambayoyi game da waɗannan sharuɗɗan?

twoByTwo.title: Tebur 2×2
twoByTwo.description: Ƙididdige odds ratio, hadarin dangi da gwaje-gwajen chi‑carré.
twoByTwo.significantAssociation: Haɗin yana da mahimmanci a ƙididdiga (p < 0.05).
twoByTwo.nonSignificantAssociation: Babu haɗin da ke da mahimmanci (p ≥ 0.05).
twoByTwo.increasedRisk: Hadarin dangi yana nuna ƙarin hadari a cikin masu bayyana.
twoByTwo.protectiveEffect: Hadarin dangi yana nuna tasirin kariya na bayyanar.
twoByTwo.noAssociation: Hadarin dangi daidai yake da 1, yana nuna babu haɗin kai.
twoByTwo.reportFooter: Mai ƙididdige 2×2 - Kayan aikin ƙididdiga don cututtuka
twoByTwo.exportSuccess: An fitar da rahoton PDF cikin nasara
twoByTwo.ciNote: Ana ƙididdige MK don OR da RR ta hanyar kimantawar Taylor (hanyar Woolf).
twoByTwo.riskBasedTitle: Ƙididdigar da suka dogara da hadari
twoByTwo.notValidCaseControl: ba a amfani da shi ga nazarin shari'a-masu kula
twoByTwo.orBasedTitle: Ƙididdigar da suka dogara da rahotannin cote
twoByTwo.orNote: Ana ƙididdige MK ta jerin Taylor (hanyar Woolf). FEp|OR = (a/c₁)·(OR−1)/OR.
twoByTwo.principleText: Binciken tebur 2×2 yana ba da damar nazarin haɗin kai tsakanin bayyanar da cuta. Ana ƙididdige odds ratio (nazarin shari'a-masu kula) da hadarin dangi (nazarin ƙungiya), da gwaje-gwajen 'yanci daban-daban.
twoByTwo.orDesc: (a·d)/(b·c). Tazarar amincewa ta hanyar kimantawar Woolf.
twoByTwo.mantelHaenszelDesc: Yana amfani da (n‑1) don ingantaccen kimantawa.
twoByTwo.fisherDesc: Dangane da rarraba hypergeometric, ana ba da shawarar ga ƙananan adadi.
twoByTwo.interpretationText: Idan tazarar amincewa na OR ko RR ta ware 1, haɗin yana da mahimmanci. Ƙimar-p na gwajin χ² tana nuna muhimmancin haɗin (p < 0.05).

doseResponse.title: Binciken Amsa ga Matsakaici
doseResponse.description: Gwajin yanayin layi don matakan bayyanar daban-daban.
doseResponse.exportSuccess: An fitar da rahoton PDF cikin nasara
doseResponse.resultsPerLevel: Sakamako ta kowane matsayi (tunani = matsayi na farko)
doseResponse.significantTrend: Yanayin {{direction}} yana da mahimmanci a ƙididdiga (p < 0.05).
doseResponse.reportFooter: Mai ƙididdige Matsakaici-Amsa - Kayan aikin ƙididdiga don cututtuka
doseResponse.principleText: Wannan gwaji yana ƙima idan akwai yanayin layi tsakanin matakin bayyanar (matsakaici) da hadarin cuta. Ana amfani dashi a cikin nazarin shari'a-masu kula ko ƙungiya tare da matakan bayyanar da yawa da aka tsara.
doseResponse.methodsText: Ga kowane matsayi, ana ƙididdige odds ratio da hadarin dangi idan aka kwatanta da matakin tunani (mafi ƙanƙanta). Gwajin yanayi shine fadada gwajin χ² (Mantel), tare da ƙididdiga da aka rarraba bisa ga χ² zuwa digiri 1 na 'yanci.
doseResponse.interpretationText: Ƙimar-p < 0.05 tana nuna yanayi mai mahimmanci. Jagora (tabbatacce/korau) yana nuna idan hadari yana ƙaruwa ko raguwa da matsakaici.

rByC.title: Tebur R×C
rByC.description: Binciken teburan daidaituwa na girman sabani.
rByC.significantInterpretation: Ƙimar p na {{p}} tana nuna haɗin da ke da mahimmanci tsakanin masu canji (p < 0.05). V na Cramér na {{v}} yana auna ƙarfin wannan haɗin.
rByC.nonSignificantInterpretation: Ƙimar p na {{p}} ba ta nuna haɗin da ke da mahimmanci tsakanin masu canji ba (p ≥ 0.05). V na Cramér na {{v}} yana nuna haɗin mara ƙarfi ko babu.
rByC.exportSuccess: An fitar da rahoton PDF cikin nasara
rByC.exportNoData: Da fatan za a fara ƙididdiga
rByC.jStatError: jStat ba ya samuwa - an kashe ƙididdiga
rByC.principleText: Ana amfani da gwajin chi-carré (χ²) na Pearson don ƙayyade idan akwai haɗin da ke da mahimmanci a ƙididdiga tsakanin masu canji biyu na rukuni. Yana kwatanta mitoci da aka lura a cikin tebur daidaituwa R×C zuwa mitoci na ƙididdiga da ake tsammani a ƙarƙashin hasashe na 'yanci.
rByC.independenceDesc: Masu canji biyu ba su da alaƙa.
rByC.independentSampleDesc: Dole ne abubuwan lura su kasance masu zaman kansu.
rByC.expectedCountsDesc: Kasa da 20 % na sel dole ne su sami adadin da ake tsammani ƙasa da 5, kuma babu adadin da ake tsammani da ya kamata ya zama ƙasa da 1. Idan wannan yanayin bai cika ba, yi la'akari da gwajin daidai (misali gwajin Fisher don tebura 2×2).
rByC.unpairedData: Bayanan da ba a haɗa ba
rByC.unpairedDataDesc: Kowane mutum yana ba da gudummawa ga sel ɗaya kawai.
rByC.chiSquareDesc: Jimlar (lura - tsammani)² / tsammani. Yawan ƙimar, girman karkacewa daga 'yanci.
rByC.dfDesc: (adadin layuka - 1) × (adadin ginshiƙai - 1). Suna ƙayyade siffar rarraba χ² a ƙarƙashin H₀.
rByC.pValueDesc: Yuwuwar lura da ƙimar χ² mai tsananin (ko fiye) a ƙarƙashin H₀. Idan p < 0,05 (kofa ta al'ada), ana ƙin H₀ a hadarin 5 %.
rByC.cramersVDesc: Ma'aunin ƙarfin haɗin, yana canzawa daga 0 ('yanci) zuwa 1 (cikakken dangantaka).
rByC.complementaryMethodsDesc: Don tebura 2×2, wasu gwaje-gwaje na iya zama mafi dacewa :
rByC.fisherExactDesc: Ana ba da shawarar lokacin da mitoci na ƙididdiga suka yi ƙanƙanta (tsammani < 5).
rByC.yatesCorrectionDesc: Wani lokaci ana amfani dashi ga χ² don tebura 2×2, yana sa gwajin ya zama mai tsaro.
rByC.jStatNote: Wannan mai ƙididdige yana amfani da ɗakin karatu na jStat don samun ƙimar-p daidai daga rarraba χ².
rByC.exampleText: A ce ana nazarin dangantaka tsakanin shan taba (mai shan / mara shan) da faruwar ciwon huhu (e / a). Tebur 2×2 zai iya zama :
rByC.exampleInterpretation: Gwajin χ² zai ba da ƙimar-p < 0,001, yana nuna haɗin da ke da mahimmanci. V na Cramér zai zama kusan 0,45, wato ƙarfi matsakaici.

screening.title: Bincike
screening.description: Binciken aikin gwajin bincike a matakai da yawa.
screening.exportSuccess: An fitar da rahoton PDF cikin nasara
screening.exportNoData: Da fatan za a fara ƙididdiga
screening.aucTitle: Wurin da ke ƙarƙashin masu lanƙwasa ROC (AUC)
screening.rocFprLabel: ADADIN KARYA MAI KYAU (1 - ƘAYYADADDUN KADDARA)
screening.rocLabel: TPR = adadin gaskiya mai kyau, FPR = adadin karya mai kyau
screening.helpPrincipleText: Wannan sashe yana ƙima aikin gwajin bincike ko bincike a matakai da yawa (na tsari ko ci-gaba). Ga kowane kofa na yanke, yana ƙididdige :
screening.helpEntropy: Hakanan yana ba da rahotannin yuwuwa na musamman ga kowane matsayi da wurin da ke ƙarƙashin masu lanƙwasa ROC (AUC) tare da tazarar amincewarsa.
screening.helpAucHighDesc: Gwaji mai aiki - bambance-bambance mai karɓa zuwa mai kyau
screening.helpAucLowDesc: Gwaji mara ma'ana - kusa da hasara
screening.helpConfidenceText: Duk tazara ana ƙididdige su bisa ga hanyoyin da aka sani.
screening.helpWilsonDesc: Kashi-kashi (hankali, ƙayyadaddun kaddara, VPP, VPN, daidaito)
screening.helpHanleyDesc: Wurin da ke ƙarƙashin masu lanƙwasa ROC (AUC)
screening.helpRocDesc: Ana samar da maki ta hanyar tara adadin matakai daga mafi cuta zuwa mafi ƙarancin cuta. Ana ƙididdige AUC ta hanyar trapezoidal.
screening.helpLevelLRDesc: LR = (shari'aᵢ / marasa‑shari'aᵢ) / (jimlar shari'a / jimlar marasa‑shari'a). MK dangane da kuskuren ma'auni na log(LR) tare da dabarar Katz.
screening.helpKappaMethodDesc: Ma'aunin yarjejeniya sama da hasara. MK = κ ± 1,96·SE(κ).
screening.helpEntropyMethodDesc: Adadin rage rashin tabbas (entropy na Shannon) bayan gwaji mai kyau ko mara kyau.
screening.helpBiasMethodDesc: (VP + KP - KN - VN) / N. Yana nuna rashin daidaituwar rarrabuwa gabaɗaya.
screening.helpExampleText: A ce gwajin sukari don gano ciwon sukari. Ana rarraba marasa lafiya zuwa matakai biyar na sukari (1 = al'ada, 5 = mai girma sosai). Bayanan da aka shigar na iya zama :
screening.helpExampleInterpretation: Binciken yana samar da masu lanƙwasa ROC, AUC na 0,5326 (MK 95% : 0,3728 - 0,6925), kuma ga kowane kofa hankali, ƙayyadaddun kaddara, da sauransu. Ana iya zaɓar mafi kyawun ciniki.
screening.helpOrderNoteText: Dole ne a shigar da matakai daga mafi ƙarancin cuta (layi na farko) zuwa mafi cuta (layi na ƙarshe). Wannan yana da mahimmanci don masu lanƙwasa ROC daidai.

oneRate.title: Adadi 1
oneRate.description: Binciken adadi da tazarar amincewarsa - PersonTime1
oneRate.exportSuccess: An fitar da rahoton PDF cikin nasara
oneRate.exportNoData: Da fatan za a fara ƙididdiga
oneRate.interpretationText: Adadin da aka lura shine {{rate}} abu(ai) a kowane raka'a mutum‑lokaci. Tazarar amincewa zuwa {{level}}% (hanyar Fisher) ta shimfiɗa daga {{lower}} zuwa {{upper}}.{{precision}}
oneRate.principleText: Adadin faruwa (ko yawan faruwa) yana auna saurin abubuwan da ke faruwa a cikin jama'a da aka biyo bayan wani ɗan lokaci. Ana ƙididdige shi azaman adadin sabbin shari'a da aka raba ta jimlar lokutan shiga (mutum‑lokaci). Tazarar amincewarsa tana nuna daidaiton wannan kimantawa.
oneRate.rateHighDesc: Abu na yau da kullun a kowane raka'a lokaci
oneRate.ciText: Tazarar amincewa zuwa 95 % (ta asali) tana nuna kewayon ƙimar da ainihin adadi yake ciki tare da yuwuwar 95 %. Yayin da tazarar ta fi kunkuntar, kimantawar ta fi daidai. Idan tazarar ta ƙunshi ƙimar 1, ba za a iya yanke hukunci akan wuce gona da iri ko ƙarancin hadari idan aka kwatanta da jama'ar tunani ba (a yanayin kwatancen waje).
oneRate.midpDesc: Gyaran ci-gaba na gwajin daidai na Poisson, ba shi da ƙarfi kamar gwajin daidai na Fisher. Ana ba da shawarar ga ƙananan adadi.
oneRate.fisherDesc: Dangane da rarraba χ², ita ce hanyar tunani ga ƙananan lambobi. Tana tabbatar da hadarin kuskure na farko aƙalla daidai da kofa na asali.
oneRate.normalDesc: Mai aiki ga manyan adadi (yawanci a > 20). Tana amfani da kuskuren ma'auni √a / N.
oneRate.byarDesc: Mai inganci sosai ko da ga ƙananan adadi (a > 5). Tana dogara ne akan canjin siffar Poisson.
oneRate.rothmanDesc: Tana amfani da logarithm na adadi da kuskuren ma'auninsa (1/√a). Tazarar daga baya tana da ma'ana. Tana tabbatar da cewa ƙarshen ƙasa ya kasance tabbatacce.
oneRate.exampleText: A cikin nazarin ƙungiya, an lura da shari'ar ciwon daji 33 a tsakanin ma'aikatan da aka biyo bayan shekaru 22 na mutum. Adadin faruwa shine :
oneRate.exampleInterpretation: Tazarar amincewa zuwa 95 % ta hanyar daidai na Fisher ita ce [1,03 - 2,10] (zuwa). Wannan yana nufin cewa ainihin adadi yana da 95 % damar kasancewa tsakanin 1,03 da 2,10 abubuwan da suka faru a kowace shekara‑mutum.

twoRates.title: Adadi biyu
twoRates.exportNoData: Da fatan za a fara ƙididdiga
twoRates.errorPersonTime: Mutum-lokaci dole ne ya zama tabbatacce.
twoRates.errorNoCases: Aƙalla rukuni ɗaya dole ne ya sami shari'a.
twoRates.zScoreTitle: Makin-z da Ma'aunin Haɗin Kai Daidai
twoRates.rateBasedTitle: Ƙididdigar da suka dogara da adadi da MK {{level}}% (a kowane {{scale}} raka'a-lokaci)
twoRates.attributableTitle: Ɓangarorin da ake dangantawa : Asali ko Kariya
twoRates.interpretationHigher: Adadi a cikin rukuni na 1 ya {{percent}}% fi girma fiye da na rukuni na 2.
twoRates.interpretationLower: Adadi a cikin rukuni na 1 ya {{percent}}% ƙasa fiye da na rukuni na 2.
twoRates.significant: bai ƙunshi 1 ba → bambanci mai mahimmanci
twoRates.nonSignificant: ya ƙunshi 1 → ba shi da mahimmanci
twoRates.helpPrincipleText: Wannan sashe yana kwatanta adadin faruwa biyu (shari'a / mutum‑lokaci) ta hanyar ƙididdige rabon adadi (RR), bambancin adadi da tazarar amincewarsu ta hanyoyi da yawa (daidai da kimantawa).
twoRates.helpMidp: Miettinen (1974d) : gyaran ci-gaba na gwajin daidai, ana ba da shawara.
twoRates.helpFisher: Armitage (1971) : dangane da rarraba hypergeometric mai sharadi.

meanCi.title: Tazarar amincewa ga matsakaita
meanCi.interpretationText: Da {{level}}% amincewa, ainihin matsakaitan jama'a yana tsakanin {{lower}} da {{upper}} (hanyar t da aka ba da shawara).
meanCi.exportNoData: Da fatan za a fara ƙididdiga
meanCi.tMethod: t na Student (ana ba da shawara)
meanCi.fpcApplied: An yi amfani da gyara don jama'a mai iyaka (FPC = {{fpc}}).
meanCi.referencesNote: Hanyoyi dangane da OpenEpi - MeanCI. Tazara Z : kimantawar al'ada. Tazara t : rarraba t na Student.
meanCi.fpcNote: An yi amfani da gyara don jama'a mai iyaka idan N aka ƙayyade kuma ƙasa da 999 999 999.
meanCi.principleText: Wannan sashe yana ƙididdige tazarar amincewa ga matsakaita daga ƙididdigar samfurin. Ana ba da hanyoyi biyu : kimantawar al'ada (Z) da rarraba t na Student, wanda ya fi dacewa ga ƙananan samfurori. Ana iya amfani da gyara don jama'a mai iyaka idan an san girman jama'a duka.
meanCi.zVsT: Z : babban samfurin (n ≥ 30). t : ƙaramin samfurin (n < 30) ko σ ba a sani ba.
meanCi.fpcDesc: Yana rage kuskuren ma'auni lokacin da samfurin ya rufe wani muhimmin sashi na jama'a.
meanCi.zDesc: MK = x̄ ± z·σ/√n, inda z shine quantile na dokar al'ada. Ana iya amfani dashi ga n ≥ 30 ko σ an sani.
meanCi.tDesc: MK = x̄ ± t·s/√n, tare da t quantile na Student zuwa (n‑1) ddl. Ana ba da shawara a aikace.

medianCi.title: Tazarar amincewa ga matsakaici / kashi dari
medianCi.description: Kimanta matsayin kashi dari a cikin jama'a
medianCi.interpretationText: Da {{level}}% amincewa, kashi {{percentile}} na dari yayi daidai da matsayi {{lowerRank}} zuwa {{upperRank}} a cikin samfurin da aka jera na girman {{n}}.
medianCi.exportNoData: Da fatan za a fara ƙididdiga
medianCi.howToUse: Yadda ake amfani da wannan sakamakon?
medianCi.howToUseSteps:
1. Jera abubuwan lura {{n}} ɗin ku ta hanyar hawa.
2. Ƙimar {{lowerRank}} ita ce ƙarshen ƙasa na MK.
3. Ƙimar {{upperRank}} ita ce ƙarshen sama.
Da {{level}}% amincewa, ainihin kashi {{percentile}} na dari yana tsakanin waɗannan ƙimomi biyu.
medianCi.referenceNote: Hanya dangane da kimantawar al'ada na matsayi (Conover, 1999).
medianCi.helpPrincipleText: Wannan sashe yana ƙididdige tazarar amincewa ga matsayin kashi dari a cikin jama'a, daga girman samfurin. Ana amfani da kimantawar al'ada na rarraba binomial.
medianCi.rankIntervalDesc: Ana ba da tazara a matsayi a cikin samfurin da aka jera, ba kai tsaye a ƙimar ba.
medianCi.conditionDesc: Kimantawa tana aiki idan n·p ≥ 5 da n·(1‑p) ≥ 5.
medianCi.intervalFormula: Tazara - [max(1, floor(matsayi - z·SE)) , min(n, ceil(matsayi + z·SE))]

twoSampleTTest.title: Gwajin t na samfurori biyu masu zaman kansu
twoSampleTTest.description: Kwatanta matsakaita biyu - Gwajin t na Student, gwajin Welch, gwajin daidaiton bambance-bambance
twoSampleTTest.copyPrefix: Gwajin t na samfurori biyu masu zaman kansu
twoSampleTTest.variancesDifferentAdvice: → Bambance-bambance sun bambanta sosai (p < 0.05). Fifita gwajin Welch.
twoSampleTTest.variancesHomogeneousAdvice: → Bambance-bambance ba su bambanta sosai ba (p >= 0.05). Gwajin Student ya dace.
twoSampleTTest.exportNoData: Da fatan za a fara ƙididdiga
twoSampleTTest.reportTitle: Rahoton gwajin t na samfurori biyu
twoSampleTTest.references: Gwajin t na Student (daidaiton bambance-bambance) da gwajin t na Welch (Satterthwaite).
twoSampleTTest.fTestRef: Gwajin daidaiton bambance-bambance : F na Hartley (rabon bambance-bambance).
twoSampleTTest.footer: Buga daga mashigar bincike ko kwafi/manna
twoSampleTTest.helpTitle: Jagora - TwoSampleTTest (Gwajin t mai zaman kansa)
twoSampleTTest.helpPrincipleText: Wannan yana kwatanta matsakaita na rukunoni biyu masu zaman kansu daga girmansu, matsakaita da karkatattun hanyoyi. Ana ba da nau'ikan gwajin t guda biyu : tare da ko ba tare da hasashe na daidaiton bambance-bambance ba. Gwajin daidaiton bambance-bambance (F na Hartley) yana ba da damar zaɓar hanyar da ta dace.
twoSampleTTest.welchDesc: Bamb. marasa daidai, ddl na Satterthwaite
twoSampleTTest.studentMethodDesc: bambance-bambance na gama gari mai auna nauyi, tazarar amincewa dangane da rarraba t tare da n₁+n₂‑2 ddl.
twoSampleTTest.welchMethodDesc: kuskuren ma'auni na Welch, ddl na Satterthwaite, tazarar amincewa mai dacewa.
twoSampleTTest.fMethodDesc: F = s₁²/s₂² (mafi girma a matsayin mai ƙididdiga). ƙimar-p mai gefe biyu.

oneWayAnova.title: ANOVA mai lamba ɗaya
oneWayAnova.description: Binciken bambance-bambance, gwajin F na Fisher, gwajin Bartlett
oneWayAnova.exportNoData: Da fatan za a fara ƙididdiga
oneWayAnova.enterData: Shigar da aƙalla rukunoni biyu masu inganci
oneWayAnova.fInterpret: Bambance-bambancen tsakanin rukunoni ya fi bambance-bambancen cikin rukunoni girma.
oneWayAnova.pInterpret: Aƙalla matsakaita ɗaya ya bambanta sosai.
oneWayAnova.ssDescText: SSB = Σ nᵢ (x̄ᵢ - x̄)², SSW = Σ (nᵢ‑1)·sᵢ², SST = SSB + SSW.
oneWayAnova.bartlettDesc: Dangane da logarithm na bambance-bambance, yana bin dokar χ².
oneWayAnova.ciDesc: MK tare da bambance-bambance na kansa (t, nᵢ‑1 ddl) da MK tare da bambance-bambance gama gari (t, N‑k ddl).
oneWayAnova.helpPrincipleText: Wannan sashe yana kwatanta matsakaita na rukunoni masu zaman kansu da yawa daga girmansu, matsakaita da karkatattun hanyoyi. Teburin ANOVA yana rarraba jimillar sauye-sauye zuwa sauye-sauyen tsakanin rukunoni da sauye-sauyen cikin rukunoni, kuma yana ba da gwajin F na Fisher. Gwajin Bartlett yana tabbatar da daidaiton bambance-bambance.

sampleSizeProportion.title: Girman samfurin ga kashi
sampleSizeProportion.subtitle: Yana ƙididdige girman samfurin da ake buƙata don kimanta kashi
sampleSizeProportion.pNote: Tsakanin 0 da 99,99. Idan akwai shakka, yi amfani da 50 %
sampleSizeProportion.deffNote: 1,0 don zaɓin samfurin bazuwar mai sauƙi
sampleSizeProportion.exportError: Fitar PDF ba zai yiwu ba
sampleSizeProportion.enterData: Shigar da ingantattun bayanai don ganin sakamako
sampleSizeProportion.footnote: Ƙididdiga tare da gyara don jama'a mai iyaka. p da d an bayyana su a kashi.
sampleSizeProportion.helpPrinciple: Wannan mai ƙididdige yana ƙayyade girman samfurin da ake buƙata don kimanta kashi tare da ingantaccen daidaito, ta amfani da gyara don jama'a mai iyaka.
sampleSizeProportion.helpFormulaZ: Z = fractile al'ada mai gefe biyu don matakin amincewa da aka zaɓa
sampleSizeProportion.helpUsage: Shigar da girman jama'a (yi amfani da 1 000 000 don "mara iyaka"), mitar da ake tsammani (p), daidaiton cikakken da ake so (± d) da tasirin tsari (1 don zaɓin samfurin bazuwar mai sauƙi). Teburin yana nuna girman samfurin da ake buƙata don matakan amincewa daga 80 % zuwa 99,99 %.

unmatchedCaseControl.title: Girman samfurin - Shari'a‑masu kula da ba a haɗa ba
unmatchedCaseControl.subtitle: Yana ƙididdige girman samfurin don nazarin shari'a‑masu kula da ba a haɗa ba (Kelsey, Fleiss, Fleiss tare da CC)
unmatchedCaseControl.ratioLabel: Adadin masu kula a kowace shari'a (r)
unmatchedCaseControl.ratioNote: Yi amfani da 1,0 don rukunoni daidai
unmatchedCaseControl.p0Label: % na masu kula da suka bayyana
unmatchedCaseControl.orNote: Bayar da ko dai odds ratio, ko % na shari'o'in da suka bayyana ; za a ƙididdige ɗayan ta atomatik.
unmatchedCaseControl.exportError: Fitar PDF ba zai yiwu ba
unmatchedCaseControl.enterDataHint: Tabbatar cewa % na masu kula da suka bayyana yana tsakanin 0 da 100, rabo > 0, da odds ratio > 0 ko % na shari'o'in da suka bayyana tsakanin 0 da 100.
unmatchedCaseControl.interpretationText: Girman da ke sama an ƙididdige su don gano odds ratio da aka ƙayyade tare da ƙarfi da matakin amincewa da aka zaɓa. Hanyar Kelsey tana amfani da kimantawar al'ada tare da bambance-bambance mai haɗawa; Fleiss tana amfani da dabarar bambance-bambance mafi daidai; Fleiss tare da gyaran ci-gaba yana daidaita bias ga ƙananan samfurori. Girman mafi girma tsakanin hanyoyin shine sau da yawa zaɓi mafi aminci.
unmatchedCaseControl.references: Kelsey et al., Methods in Observational Epidemiology 2nd Ed., Table 12‑15 ; Fleiss, Statistical Methods for Rates and Proportions, dabara 3.18 & 3.19.
unmatchedCaseControl.footnote: CC = gyaran ci-gaba. Ana tattara sakamako zuwa lamba mafi girma. Dabarar Fleiss tare da gyara tana amfani da girman samfurin da ba a tattara ba na Fleiss azaman tushe.
unmatchedCaseControl.reportTitle: Girman samfurin - Nazarin shari'a‑masu kula da ba a haɗa ba
unmatchedCaseControl.helpPrinciple: Wannan mai ƙididdige yana ƙididdige girman samfurin da ake buƙata don nazarin shari'a‑masu kula da ba a haɗa ba. Kuna ƙayyade adadin bayyanar da ake tsammani a cikin masu kula (p0), odds ratio da ake so (ko kashi a cikin shari'o'i), rabon masu kula/shari'a (r), ƙarfi da matakin amincewa. Ana ƙididdige girman bisa ga hanyoyi guda uku na yau da kullun : Kelsey (kimantawar al'ada), Fleiss (bambance-bambance daidai) da Fleiss tare da gyaran ci-gaba.
unmatchedCaseControl.helpUsage: Shigar da matakin amincewa (95% ta asali), ƙarfi (80% na al'ada), rabon masu kula/shari'a (1 don rukunoni daidai), kashi na masu kula da suka bayyana (daga wallafe-wallafe), da ko dai odds ratio don ganowa, ko kashi na shari'o'in da suka bayyana. Sakamako suna sabunta ta atomatik. Yi amfani da maɓallin "Misali" don ɗora ƙimomi na yau da kullun. Kuna iya kwafi sakamako ko fitar da su zuwa PDF.

cohortSampleSize.title: Girman samfurin - Ƙungiya / Gwaji bazuwar
cohortSampleSize.subtitle: Yana ƙididdige girman samfurin don nazarin ƙungiya ko gwaji bazuwar (Kelsey, Fleiss, Fleiss tare da CC)
cohortSampleSize.ratioNote: Yi amfani da 1,0 don rukunoni daidai
cohortSampleSize.p0Label: % na marasa bayyana tare da sakamako
cohortSampleSize.orNote: Shigar da ɗaya daga cikin ukun (OR, RR ko RD) ; za a ƙididdige sauran ta atomatik.
cohortSampleSize.exportError: Fitar PDF ba zai yiwu ba
cohortSampleSize.enterDataHint: Tabbatar cewa % na marasa bayyana yana tsakanin 0 da 100, rabo > 0, da ɗaya daga cikin siffofi (OR, RR ko RD) mai inganci.
cohortSampleSize.interpretationText: Girman da ke sama an ƙididdige su don gano tasirin da aka ƙayyade (OR, RR ko RD) tare da ƙarfi da matakin amincewa da aka zaɓa. Hanyar Kelsey tana amfani da kimantawar al'ada tare da bambance-bambance mai haɗawa; Fleiss tana amfani da dabarar bambance-bambance mafi daidai; Fleiss tare da gyaran ci-gaba yana daidaita bias ga ƙananan samfurori. Girman mafi girma tsakanin hanyoyin shine sau da yawa zaɓi mafi aminci.
cohortSampleSize.references: Kelsey et al., Methods in Observational Epidemiology 2nd Ed., Table 12‑15 ; Fleiss, Statistical Methods for Rates and Proportions, dabara 3.18 & 3.19.
cohortSampleSize.footnote: CC = gyaran ci-gaba. Ana tattara sakamako zuwa lamba mafi girma. Dabarar Fleiss tare da gyara tana amfani da girman samfurin da ba a tattara ba na Fleiss azaman tushe.
cohortSampleSize.reportSubtitle: Mai ƙididdige girman samfurin - Ƙungiya / Gwaji bazuwar
cohortSampleSize.reportFooter: Mai ƙididdige girman samfurin - Ƙungiya / Gwaji bazuwar
cohortSampleSize.helpPrinciple: Wannan mai ƙididdige yana ƙididdige girman samfurin da ake buƙata don nazarin ƙungiya ko gwaji bazuwar. Kuna ƙayyade adadin abubuwan da suka faru a cikin marasa bayyana (p0), tasirin da ake so (OR, RR ko RD), rabon marasa bayyana/masu bayyana (r), ƙarfi da matakin amincewa. Ana ƙididdige girman bisa ga hanyoyi guda uku na yau da kullun : Kelsey (kimantawar al'ada), Fleiss (bambance-bambance daidai) da Fleiss tare da gyaran ci-gaba.
cohortSampleSize.helpUsage: Shigar da matakin amincewa (95% ta asali), ƙarfi (80% na al'ada), rabon marasa bayyana/masu bayyana (1 don rukunoni daidai), kashi na marasa bayyana tare da abin da ya faru, da ɗaya daga cikin siffofi uku na tasiri (OR, RR ko RD). Sakamako suna sabunta ta atomatik. Yi amfani da maɓallin "Misali" don ɗora ƙimomi na yau da kullun. Kuna iya kwafi sakamako ko fitar da su zuwa PDF.

meanDiffSample.title: Girman Samfurin - Bambancin Matsakaita
meanDiffSample.subtitle: Yana ƙididdige girman samfurin da ake buƙata don gano bambanci tsakanin matsakaita biyu masu zaman kansu
meanDiffSample.ratioNote: Yi amfani da 1 don rukunoni daidai
meanDiffSample.enterData: Shigar da ingantattun siffofi don ganin sakamako
meanDiffSample.enterDataHint: Tabbatar cewa matsakaita da karkatattun hanyoyi lambobi ne, karkatattun hanyoyi > 0, rabo > 0 kuma matsakaita sun bambanta.
meanDiffSample.reportSubtitle: Mai ƙididdige girman samfurin - Bambancin Matsakaita
meanDiffSample.reportFooter: Mai ƙididdige girman samfurin - Bambancin Matsakaita
meanDiffSample.interpretationText: Girman samfurin da aka ƙididdiga yana ba da damar nazarin samun ƙarfi na {{power}} % don gano bambanci na {{delta}} tsakanin matsakaita biyu, tare da matakin amincewa na {{confidence}} % (gwaji mai gefe biyu). Jimlar girman shine {{total}}. Karkatacciyar hanya mai haɗawa ita ce matsakaita mai auna nauyi na karkatattun hanyoyi na rukunoni biyu.
meanDiffSample.formula:
n₁ = (z_α/₂ + z_β)² × (σ₁² + σ₂² / r) / Δ²
n₂ = r × n₁
tare da Δ = |μ₁ - μ₂|, r = n₂/n₁
meanDiffSample.formulaExplanation: inda Δ = |μ₁ - μ₂|, r = n₂/n₁, da z sune quantiles na dokar al'ada.
meanDiffSample.footnote: Ana tattara sakamako zuwa lamba mafi girma. Ana ƙididdige karkatacciyar hanya mai haɗawa daga girman samfurin da aka ƙididdiga.
meanDiffSample.helpPrinciple: Wannan mai ƙididdige yana ƙayyade girman samfurin da ake buƙata don gano wani bambanci da aka ƙayyade tsakanin matsakaita biyu masu zaman kansu, dangane da karkatattun hanyoyi, matakin amincewa, ƙarfi da rabon rabawa (n₂/n₁). Yana amfani da dabarar daidaitacce don samfurori biyu masu zaman kansu (bambance-bambance marasa daidai).
meanDiffSample.helpUsage: Shigar da matsakaita da karkatattun hanyoyi don rukunoni biyu, matakin amincewa (yawanci 95 %), ƙarfi (sau da yawa 80 %) da rabon girman samfurin (n₂/n₁). Yi amfani da maɓallin Misali don ɗora ƙimomi na yau da kullun. Sakamako suna nunawa ta atomatik. Kuna iya kwafi sakamako ko fitar da su zuwa PDF.

randomNumberGenerator.notesText:
Buga lambobi daga menu Fayil na mashigar bincike ko kwafi da manna su cikin masu sarrafa rubutu, Excel da sauran shirye-shirye.

Ana samar da lambobi ta aikin JavaScript Math.random(). Ko da yake waɗannan lambobi bazuwar ne, aikin Math.random a cikin mashigar bincike na yau da kullun an gwada shi da mutane da yawa kuma an gano cewa yana samar da lambobi 'bazuwar' masu inganci. Don ƙarin bayani, bincika akan Intanet 'Lambobi bazuwar masu inganci' da batutuwa masu alaƙa.

randomNumberGenerator.errorMinMax: Mafi ƙaranci dole ne ya zama ƙasa da ko daidai da mafi girman
randomNumberGenerator.errorUniqueRange: Adadin da aka nema ya wuce kewayon da ake samu don lambobi na musamman
randomNumberGenerator.helpPrinciple: Wannan mai samarwa yana samar da lambobi gabaɗaya bazuwar a cikin kewayon da mai amfani ya ayyana. Zaɓin 'Lambobi na musamman' yana ba da damar zaɓi ba tare da maye gurbin ba, mai amfani ga samfurori ba tare da maimaitawa ba.
randomNumberGenerator.helpUnique: kowace lamba tana bayyana aƙalla sau ɗaya (yana buƙatar adadin da ake nema ya zama ≤ girman kewayon).
